017package org.apache.juneau.marshall;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ReflectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.text.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
025
026/**
027 * General invalid conversion exception.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Exception that gets thrown if you try to perform an invalid conversion, such as when calling
031 * {@code JsonMap.getInt(...)} on a non-numeric <c>String</c>.
032 *
033 *
034 * @serial exclude
035 */
036@SuppressWarnings({
037   "java:S110" // Deep inheritance inherent to the exception hierarchy
038})
039public class InvalidDataConversionException extends BasicRuntimeException {
040
041   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
042
043   private static String name(Class<?> c) {
044      return info(c).getNameFull();
045   }
046
047   private static String name(Object o) {
048      return info(o).getNameFull();
049   }
050
051   private static String value(Object o) {
052      if (o instanceof Class<?> o2)
053         return "'" + name(o2) + "'";
054      return Json5Serializer.DEFAULT == null ? "'" + o.toString() + "'" : Json5Serializer.DEFAULT.toString(o);
055   }
056
057   /**
058    * @param toType Attempting to convert to this class type.
059    * @param cause The cause.
060    * @param value The value being converted.
061    */
062   public InvalidDataConversionException(Object value, Class<?> toType, Exception cause) {
063      this(cause, "Invalid data conversion from type ''{0}'' to type ''{1}''.  Value={2}.", name(value), name(toType), value(value));
064   }
065
066   /**
067    * @param toType Attempting to convert to this class type.
068    * @param cause The cause.
069    * @param value The value being converted.
070    */
071   public InvalidDataConversionException(Object value, ClassMeta<?> toType, Exception cause) {
072      this(cause, "Invalid data conversion from type ''{0}'' to type ''{1}''.  Value={2}.", name(value), s(toType), value(value));
073   }
074
075   /**
076    * Constructor.
077    *
078    * @param cause The cause of this exception.
079    * @param message The {@link MessageFormat}-style message.
080    * @param args Optional {@link MessageFormat}-style arguments.
081    */
082   public InvalidDataConversionException(Throwable cause, String message, Object...args) {
083      super(cause, message, args);
084   }
085
086   @Override /* Overridden from BasicRuntimeException */
087   public InvalidDataConversionException setMessage(String message, Object...args) {
088      super.setMessage(message, args);
089      return this;
090   }
091}
